Case# CWErr.cwShortSlotUnsupportedErr

macOS 10.6+

```
case cwShortSlotUnsupportedErr
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/corewlan/cwerr/cwshortslotunsupportederr#Discussion)

Association denied because short slot time option is not supported by requesting station.
